metadata.name: SentiKenya Training Dataset v1
metadata.description: Labeled sentiment dataset for Kenyan social media across English, Swahili, and Sheng

data.text: Manze hii serikali iko rada wasee mambo ni poa
Siste hii economy ni tight sana pesa imeisha bana
Hii mambo ya tax ni noma bana inaumiza wasee
Tech ndio future ya Kenya na youth wako ready
Wasee wa bunge wanajipangia salary kubwa na sisi tunapiga hustle
